chunks.text: IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH CIRCUIT COURT, LARKANA Present: Irshad Ali Shah, J. Agha Faisal, J. CP D1035 of 2017: Safeer Ahmed Leghari & others vs. Sindh Public Service Commission Hyderabad & others For the Petitioners: Mr. Habibullah G. Ghouri, Advocate For the Respondents: Mr. Abdul Hamid Bhurgri, Addl. A.G. Date of hearing: 01.03.2022. Date of announcement: 01.03.2022. ORDER Agha Faisal, J. The petitioners had challenged direct appointment in their department as it was apprehended that the same would adversely impact the services of employees already serving therein. The learned Addl. A.G. draws attention to paragraphs 3 and 5 of the comments filed by the concerned Secretary to demonstrate that the department has separate provisions for appointment by promotion and direct appointment and that the direct appointments are envisaged not to have any impact upon the promotion posts. The petitioners’ counsel, under instructions, is satisfied by the explanation provided and seeks disposal of this petition on the said terms. Order accordingly. JUDGE JUDGE
